summary.short_rationale: Elkornacio is technically strong but overlap-heavy: no clean matrix gaps, three exact overlaps, and one probe-needed MCP security cell. His best value is limited-scope depth for AI coding tool/harness judgment.
summary.strongest_argument_for: The passport and source spot checks show a distinctive advanced lens: Model vs Harness vs UI, native-harness quality, deterministic workflows, Git-branch hyper-customization, and pointed MCP security critique.
summary.strongest_argument_against: The current matrix already strongly covers coding-agent tool choice, agentic development workflow, and MCP/tooling; deterministic preflight finds zero clean gaps.

accepted_basis_cells.interpretation: limited-scope depth for advanced coding-agent tool choice via model/harness/UI framing and native-harness argument

duplicate_or_supporting_cells.interpretation: MCP/tooling workflow already covered; useful contrarian color only

probe_or_supporting_cells.interpretation: promising MCP security critique, but evidence-thin and not yet a clean governance gap

good_fit: model vs harness vs UI in coding agents
native harness vs mixed harness coding-tool comparisons
advanced Cursor / Codex / Claude Code tool judgment
deterministic workflows for AI coding agents
Git-branch hyper-customization and per-client product variants
MCP security critique and restricted API / CLI alternatives
poor_fit: enterprise-safe executive summaries without tone filtering
broad AI strategy or business adoption
primary source for new matrix coverage
neutral MCP advocacy or generic MCP tutorial

risk_notes: Three of four candidate cells overlap exact accepted cells.
Heavy informal/profane style may require filtering.
Model and tool comparisons age quickly.
MCP security cell should be probed before production routing weight is raised.
recommended_manifest_caveat: limited-scope depth for advanced AI coding tool/harness judgment and contrarian agent workflow critique; no clean matrix gaps, avoid broad duplicate routing

probe_shape: 2 model/harness/UI comparison queries against Ilia, Glebkudr, AI_Grabli, and Polyakov
1 MCP security query against PashaZloy, Neuraldeep, and Rinat
1 beginner/general coding-agent query where Elkornacio should not be primary
